arts.ttl: Transfer Talk: Man United, West Ham eyeing Bayern's Goretzka
arts.sum: Two Premier League clubs are monitoring the situation of Bayern Munich midfielder Leon Goretzka, reports The Sun . Multiple clubs including Liverpool, Real Madrid, and Arsenal are reported to be among the sides keen on the 21-year-old, but it looks as though the Citizens have got themselves to the front of the queue.

arts.ttl: Match awards from Bayern Munich’s sensational 9-2 Champions League win over Dinamo Zagreb
arts.sum: Guerreiro was tasked with filling the attacking half space between Jamal Musiala and Michael Olise, plus tracking back to cover the random bursts forward by Takuya Ogiwara. Before Olise scored his first career Champions League goal, he was already giving the Dinamo Zagreb defense fits with his stop-and-go dribbling.

arts.ttl: CL round-up: Kane and Bayern break records as holders Real get off mark
arts.sum: Harry Kane eclipsed Wayne Rooney's Champions League record with a hat-trick of penalties in a four-goal haul as Bayern Munich demolished Dinamo Zagreb 9-2.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane breaks records on Champions League return as Liverpool, Aston Villa and Real Madrid all win
arts.sum: Kane scored four as Bayern ran riot against Dinamo Zagreb with Kylian Mbappe scoring for Real

arts.ttl: Kompany reveals reason for taking Neuer off in 9-2 win over Dinamo Zagreb
arts.sum: After Bayern Munich's 9-2 win over Dinamo Zagreb, Vincent Kompany explained why Manuel Neuer was taken off at half-time and reflected on the performance.

arts.ttl: Kane nets 4, passes Rooney in record Bayern rout
arts.sum: Harry Kane scored four times on Tuesday to bring his Champions League goal total to 34, blowing past the previous record of 30 set by Wayne Rooney for the most goals by an English player in the competition.

arts.ttl: Four-goal hero Kane reacts to Bayern's thrashing of Dinamo: "Amazing game!"
arts.sum: After scoring four goals in a 9-2 win, Harry Kane was unsurprisingly delighted.

arts.ttl: Bayern become first team to score nine goals in a Champions League game with 9-2 win over Dinamo Zagreb
arts.sum: With Tuesday's wild 9-2 win over Dinamo Zagreb, Bayern Munich became the first team ever to score nine goals in a Champions League match.

arts.ttl: Kane scores four goals as Bayern crush Dinamo 9-2
arts.sum: Harry Kane netted four times as Bayern Munich crushed Dinamo Zagreb 9-2 in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane breaks Wayne Rooney's Champions League record with Bayern Munich efforts
arts.sum: Harry Kane has become the most prolific English goalscorer in Champions League history, with his latest Bayern Munich strikes seeing him overhaul Wayne Rooney at the top of the pile
